title: The Ultimate Bubble Show
description: Ray Bubbles, International Bubbleologist and 4 time Guinness World Record Holder, is on a mission to master the art of bubble-making and create the ultimate square bubble! This show promises a whirlwind of excitement and surprises, as Ray uses various different gases to craft stunning bubble sculptures, effects, and magical displays. Prepare to be amazed as Ray creates a volcano bubble, a soap bubble carousel, a bubble ghost, and even a tornado inside a bubble! The show was inspired by Ray’s work with SEND schools, adult neurodivergent groups, and science centres across Europe. The performance is suitable for children and adults with additional needs. Join Ray and see if he can create the ultimate square bubble! This is the UK & Ireland's favourite bubble show with over 130 dates in 2025 and combined audiences of over 30,000!!!
